name: HubSpot
description: Manage HubSpot CRM contacts, companies, deals, and tickets. Search and update records, track sales pipelines, and automate CRM workflows through AI chat.
user_auth_instructions:
Click 'Connect' to link your HubSpot account.
You'll be prompted to select your HubSpot account and grant permissions.
setup_notes:
Uses HubSpot's official remote MCP server.

Admin setup:
1. Go to your HubSpot account > Development > MCP Auth Apps
2. Create a new MCP Auth App
3. Set the app name, redirect URL, and optional icon
4. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
5. The server uses OAuth 2.1 with PKCE for authentication

Currently supports read-only access to: contacts, companies,
deals, tickets, products, orders, line items, invoices, quotes.
